transactions.details: Boston Red Soxsent LHPPatrick Sandovalon a rehab assignment to Worcester Red Sox.
Chicago White Soxtransferred LFBrooks Baldwinfrom the 10-day injured list to the 60-day injured list. Right elbow sprain.
Cincinnati Redsplaced CJose Trevinoon the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 5, 2026. Thoracic spine strain.
Chicago White Soxselected the contract of LHPTyler Schweitzerfrom Charlotte Knights.
Boston Red Soxrecalled LHPTyler Samaniegofrom Worcester Red Sox.
Cincinnati Redsselected the contract of CP.J. Higginsfrom Louisville Bats.
Chicago White Soxoptioned RHPShane Smithto Charlotte Knights.
